note: Mathlib/Data/Nat/Choose/Basic.lean:50 — `def choose : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ` is the binomial coefficient C(n,k), computed by the standard Pascal recursion.

Mathlib/GroupTheory/Finiteness.lean:395 — `class Group.FG : Prop` states the top subgroup is finitely generated (Group.fg_iff gives the closure-of-a-finite-set characterization); this IS the finitely-generated-group property.

Mathlib/Geometry/Euclidean/Altitude.lean:236 — `height` = distance from a simplex vertex to the foot of its altitude; generalizes the elementary linear-measure height (mathworld/proofwiki sense) from triangles to n-simplices.

Mathlib/Analysis/Complex/UpperHalfPlane/Metric.lean:42 — defines the Poincaré (hyperbolic) distance on the upper half-plane, `dist z w = 2*arsinh(...)`; formalizes one specific model of hyperbolic geometry, not the general axiomatic theory (no synthetic/abstract hyperbolic-plane axiom system found).

Mathlib/NumberTheory/Primorial.lean:40 — defines the primorial function n# itself (product of primes ≤ n); the derived notion 'primorial prime' (n#±1 prime) is NOT defined/stated anywhere in Mathlib, so this is only the underlying ingredient, not the concept.
